title: Past Perfect Continuous
description: HAD BEEN + -ing describes an action in progress before another moment in the past.
summary_pt_br: HAD BEEN + -ing: ação contínua anterior a outro momento passado. 'She had been surfing when the storm came.'

scenes.subtitle_en: HAD BEEN + -ing describes an action in progress before another moment in the past.
scenes.subtitle_pt: HAD BEEN + -ing: ação contínua anterior a outro momento passado. 'She had been surfing when the storm came.'

scenes.text_en: HAD BEEN + -ing describes an action in progress before another moment in the past. Today's focus: past perfect continuous. She had been training for months when the injury happened.
scenes.text_pt: HAD BEEN + -ing: ação contínua anterior a outro momento passado. 'She had been surfing when the storm came.' Foco de hoje: past perfect continuous. Ela estava treinando há meses quando se lesionou.

scenes.title: Past Perfect Continuous
scenes.body_en: Form: HAD BEEN + -ing. Use to emphasize duration of an action that was ongoing before something else happened. 'She had been surfing for two hours when the storm arrived.'
scenes.body_pt: HAD BEEN + -ing: ação contínua anterior a outro momento passado. 'She had been surfing when the storm came.'

examples.en: She had been training for months when the injury happened.
examples.pt: Ela estava treinando há meses quando se lesionou.

examples.en: They had been waiting for two hours before the bus arrived.
examples.pt: Estavam esperando há 2 horas quando o ônibus chegou.

examples.en: We had been working all night when the email finally came.
examples.pt: Trabalhávamos a noite toda quando o email chegou.

exercise.question: Complete: "She had been ___ for months when the injury happened."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "She had been training for months when the injury happened."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Ela estava treinando há meses quando se lesionou.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
They had been waiting for two hours before the bus arrived.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "They had been waiting for two hours before the bus arrived."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Estavam esperando há 2 horas quando o ônibus chegou.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Past Perfect Continuous — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre past perfect continuous. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Bia, what happened before the accident at the competition?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I had been surfing for three hours non-stop.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Had you been feeling tired or dizzy?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I had been feeling strong until the last wave.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Had anyone warned you about the weather?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The coach had been watching the sky closely.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What had you been preparing for all year?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I had been training for this exact competition.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How did you feel right after the fall?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I had been crying silently before my mom came.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Setbacks teach us more than easy wins ever will.

scenes.title: The wave that broke the year
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe what Bia had been doing before the fall and what happened right after. Use past perfect continuous.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: The competition had been running smoothly when a sudden shift in the swell changed everything.

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: I had been surfing for three hours and feeling invincible all morning.

paragraphs.speaker: Coach
paragraphs.en: She had been riding the biggest waves of her life just minutes before the fall.

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: I had been ignoring the pain in my shoulder for two weeks before the contest.

paragraphs.speaker: Doctor
paragraphs.en: You had been pushing your body harder than your recovery could keep up with.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Three months of rest would become the start of a stronger, more patient athlete.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Past Perfect Continuous". HAD BEEN + -ing describes an action in progress before another moment in the past. She had been training for months when the injury happened. They had been waiting for two hours before the bus arrived. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Past Perfect Continuous". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Past Perfect Continuous".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
